$comment: Registry of credibility claims rendered on the homepage. Each entry maps a claim id to (a) the source files where the copy lives, (b) the literal phrase as it must appear in source, and (c) a Supabase-backed assertion that must be true for the claim to ship. Run `npm run verify:credibility` (also runs automatically before `npm run build`) to validate.

banned.reason: Volume claim not backed by Supabase data. Add an entry in `claims` with a count assertion before using.
Numeric volume claim not backed by Supabase data. Register the claim with a count assertion or remove it.
Hard-coded product rating in source. Ratings must come from the products / product_reviews table.
Hard-coded review count in source. Review counts must come from the product_reviews table.
